author: Glenn
text:
Jude needs to do the same with his own token ГўВЂВ” each person sets their own on
   their own machine. Once it's set the red warning disappears and sessions   
  will save to GitHub.                                                        
                           1. GitHub ГўВ†В’ Settings ГўВ†В’ Developer settings ГўВ†В’ Personal access tokens ГўВ†В’ Tokens 
  (classic)                                                                   
  2. Click Generate new token (classic)
  3. Give it a name (e.g. "CGT Admin")                                        
  4. Check repo scope (full repo access)                    
  5. Generate ГўВ†В’ copy the token          
  6. Paste it into the Token field in CGT Admin ГўВ†В’ Save Token
